title: explain + error-code registry
manager: The `explain` verb plus the error-code registry it reads — every FSL error has a stable code, and `explain FSL1234` gives you the full description, cause, and fix. This turns a cryptic error into a teachable one, and because the registry was reserved back in v6 the codes are public API, so tools and docs link directly to an error's explanation instead of fragile pattern-matching on message strings.
cs: `explain` verb over the error-code registry (reserved in WP6.8); stable `FSL####` codes; projection B6; the human-facing half of the error model.
